heading: Drop Collections Examples
body:
The following examples use the `drop` command to remove sample
collections that were mapped to the sample dataset,
[airbnb](https://atlas-data-lake.s3.amazonaws.com/json/sample_airbnb/listingsAndReviews.json)
and
[weather](https://atlas-data-lake.s3.amazonaws.com/json/sample_weatherdata/data.json),
in the AWS (Amazon Web Services) S3 (Simple Storage Service) store.
